I'd actively listen to the concerns expressed, paraphrasing and reflecting back what I hear to ensure clarity and demonstrate my commitment to listening.

The high openness score in my personality profile indicates a willingness to consider diverse viewpoints and explore new information. Social media usage, while a part of my daily routine, should not be a source of undue stress.
